---
name: Tool Submission
about: Submit your app, tool, or game for SpectraCodex
title: "Submission: [Your Tool Name]"
labels: submission
assignees: ""
---

## Launch Kit

**One-line pitch** (max 120 characters):
<!-- Describe what your tool does in one sentence. Be specific, not vague. -->

**Who it's for:**
<!-- One specific audience. e.g. "Freelance designers who need quick color palettes" -->

**Problem it solves** (one sentence):
<!-- What painful thing does your tool make fast, easy, or free? -->

**Primary CTA link:**
<!-- The URL you want people to click — must be live and publicly accessible -->

**CTA button label:**
<!-- e.g. "Try it free", "Play now", "Get started" -->

**Price model:**
<!-- free / freemium / paid -->

**Thumbnail URL** (400×300px):
<!-- A screenshot or designed card showing your tool. Placeholder images will be rejected. -->

**Screenshot URLs** (at least 1, ideally 2):
<!--
1. https://...
2. https://...
-->

**30-second demo script** (4 bullet points in order):
<!--
1. ...
2. ...
3. ...
4. ...
-->

**Tags** (1–3 lowercase):
<!-- e.g. game, productivity, design, finance, writing, tool, local -->

**Contact email:**
<!-- How we can reach you if we have questions -->

**Permission to feature:**
<!-- Confirm: "Yes, I give SpectraCodex permission to feature this tool in a drop." -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My tool is live and publicly accessible right now
- [ ] I built this myself (or as part of a small team)
- [ ] The pitch is 120 characters or fewer
- [ ] I have provided at least 1 real screenshot (not a placeholder)
- [ ] The 30-second demo script walks through actual functionality
- [ ] I have given permission to feature this tool
